name: pilot-dotnet
description: C# / ASP.NET Core governance: Clean Architecture, SOLID/DRY, permissions-only authorization (no role checks), authentication, multitenancy, EF Core patterns (soft delete, audit fields, concurrency), API versioning/pagination/idempotency, resilience (Polly), observability, ProblemDetails error handling, caching, messaging (outbox, saga, Service Bus), background jobs, feature flags, SignalR, gRPC, BFF, testing, data protection, and NuGet governance. Ships @dotnet-reviewer (finds violations), @dotnet-implementor (fixes them), and @dotnet-support (diagnoses backend issues to root cause)
